plot outline: When anti-death-penalty activist David Gale is convicted and condemned to death for the murder of a colleague, reporter Bitsey Bloom sets out to learn the story behind Gale's crime. What she finds challenges her belief in Gale's guilt and, finally, in the justice system.
title: The Life of David Gale
akas: Животът на Дейвид Гейл (Bulgaria, Bulgarian title)

other companies.name: The Texas Department of Criminal Justice
